description_long: This object is a stylized sword with a straight, double-edged blade that is predominantly light green with dark blue outlining along the edges and spine. The blade is long and tapers to a sharp point, suitable for thrusting and slashing. The crossguard is angular and geometric, extending horizontally with a matching color scheme, providing hand protection. The handle is straight and wrapped in alternating blue and green bands, ending in a flat, metallic pommel. The rear view reveals three circular accents on the guard, adding a subtle decorative touch. The overall design is modern and minimalistic, with a focus on clean lines and bold color contrast.
description: A stylized, straight-bladed sword with a light green blade, dark blue edges, and a geometric crossguard. The handle is wrapped in blue and green bands with a flat pommel.
description_view_0: Front view showing the full length of the light green blade, dark blue outlining, and the angular crossguard.
description_view_1: Side view displaying the thin profile of the blade and handle, emphasizing the sword's sharpness and symmetry.
description_view_2: Rear view highlighting three circular accents on the crossguard and the same color scheme as the front.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, similar to view 1, showing the slimness of the blade and handle.
attribute_handle_design: straight, wrapped in blue and green bands, flat pommel
attribute_ornamentation: three circular accents on the guard
